name: T1 Glass-Ceiling Push 2026-05-13 Slot B pre-registration

formula_payload.experiment: T1 Glass-Ceiling Push 2026-05-13 Slot B — V3-GSP at item-12 chain step + CCC-descending order
formula_payload.tri_cli_consult: codex+gemini Slot A consult informed mechanism; CCC-descending order adopted; Slot B-specific consult pending

cohort.filter: PD with items 9-14, 15, 18 + V3-GSP feature coverage (N=92)

stage2.chain_order_policy: FIXED CCC-descending; item 12 step first → no upstream chain features

per_step_feature_routing.item_12: V3-GSP features ONLY (550 cols, no K=500 selection, fold-local median impute)
per_step_feature_routing.items_9_10_11_13_14_15_18: V2 K=500 LGB-importance against T1 residual (iter34 standard)

stage2.ensemble_method: average chain-output across 3 bases per fold per seed

eval.screen_gate: 5-fold Δ̄ vs iter34-5-fold (same KFold seeds) ≥ +0.020 AND seed std < 0.020
eval.loocv_gate: paired bootstrap frac>0 ≥ 0.9875 vs iter34 LOOCV on N=92 AND vs iter12-honest on N=92

leakage_assertions: feature_select_fold + impute_fold operate on outer-train only
V3-GSP imputation: fold-local median, train-fold only
no global imputers, no cohort-wide z-scoring, no global ranks
